summaries.bn: ইমাম আল-বাক্বির (আ.) তাঁর শিয়া অনুসারীদের শেখালেন কীভাবে সূরা আল-কাদর এবং সূরা আদ-দুখানের আয়াতগুলি ইমামতের প্রমাণ হিসেবে ব্যবহার করতে হয়। সংলাপের মাধ্যমে তিনি প্রমাণ করলেন যে নবী (সা.) আলী (আ.) কে কুরআনের একমাত্র সত্যিকারের ব্যাখ্যাকারী নিযুক্ত করে গেছেন। ইমামের সত্য গোপন রাখা ইসলামের ভোরের মতো, যা যথাসময়ে প্রকাশিত হবে।
summaries.de: Imam al-Baqir (F) lehrte seine Anhänger, wie sie die Sure Al-Qadr und die Einleitungsverse der Sure Ad-Dukhan als Beweis für das Imamat verwenden können. Durch einen Dialog bewies er, dass der Prophet nicht gestorben ist, ohne Ali als einzigen autorisierten Ausleger des Korans zu bestimmen. Die Verborgenheit der Imamat-Wahrheit ist analog zu den frühen geheimen Jahren des Islam.
summaries.en: Imam al-Baqir (peace be upon him) delivers a theological discourse to his Shia followers, explaining the significance of Surah Al-Qadr (97) and Surah Al-Dukhan (44:1-3) as proofs of the Imamate after the Prophet. Through a question-and-answer dialogue, he establishes that just as every community had a warner sent by God, Muhammad did not die without appointing a successor warner — identified as Ali ibn Abi Talib — as the authoritative interpreter of the Quran. He also explains that the concealment of the Imam's true status is analogous to the early secrecy of Islam itself, until the appointed time for its manifestation arrives.
summaries.es: El Imam al-Baqir (p) enseñó a sus seguidores a usar la Sura Al-Qadr y los versículos iniciales de la Sura Ad-Dukhan como prueba de la Imamía. A través de un diálogo, demostró que el Profeta no murió sin nombrar a Alí como su sucesor e intérprete del Corán. La ocultación de la verdad del Imamato es análoga a los primeros años del Islam.
summaries.fa: امام باقر علیه السلام در این روایت به شیعیان آموخت که از سوره قدر و آیات ابتدایی سوره دخان به‌عنوان حجت برای اثبات امامت استفاده کنند. از طریق گفت‌وگو اثبات کرد که پیامبر، علی علیه السلام را به‌عنوان مفسر قرآن و جانشین خود معرفی کرد. پنهان‌کاری حقیقت امامت نیز همانند آغاز پنهانی اسلام است که تا زمان مقرر ادامه دارد.
summaries.fr: L'Imam al-Bâqir (p) a enseigné à ses partisans comment utiliser la sourate Al-Qadr et les versets initiaux de la sourate Ad-Dukhan comme preuve de l'Imamat. Par un dialogue, il a démontré que le Prophète n'est pas mort sans nommer Ali comme successeur et interprète unique du Coran. La dissimulation de la vérité de l'Imamat est analogue aux premières années secrètes de l'Islam.
summaries.id: Imam al-Baqir (a.s.) mengajarkan kepada para pengikutnya cara menggunakan Surah Al-Qadr dan Surah Ad-Dukhan sebagai bukti Imamat. Melalui dialog, beliau membuktikan bahwa Nabi tidak wafat tanpa meninggalkan penerus, dan Ali ibn Abi Thalib adalah penafsir tunggal Al-Quran yang sah. Penyembunyian kebenaran Imamat serupa dengan periode awal Islam yang tersembunyi.
summaries.ru: Имам аль-Бакир (мир ему) объяснил своим последователям, как использовать суру аль-Кадр и начальные аяты суры ад-Духан в качестве доказательства Имамата. Через диалог он доказал, что Пророк не скончался, не назначив Али единственным авторитетным толкователем Корана. Сокрытие истины об Имамате аналогично раннему периоду тайного существования ислама.
summaries.tr: İmam Bâkır (a.s.), Kadir ve Duhan surelerinin İmamet için delil oluşturduğunu açıklayarak Şia toplumuna bu surelerle tartışmalarını öğütledi. Bir diyalog aracılığıyla her toplumun uyarıcısı olduğunu ve Hz. Muhammed'in de ölmeden önce Ali'yi (a.s.) Kur'an'ın tek yetkili müfessiri olarak atadığını ortaya koydu. İmamet hakikatinin gizlenmesi, İslam'ın ilk yıllarındaki sırrı gibidir.
summaries.ur: امام باقر علیہ السلام نے شیعوں کو سورۂ قدر اور سورۂ دخان کی آیات کو دلیل کے طور پر استعمال کرنے کی ہدایت فرمائی۔ سوال و جواب کے ذریعے انہوں نے ثابت کیا کہ جیسے ہر امت میں نذیر آتا رہا، محمد صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ نے بھی علی علیہ السلام کو قرآن کا مفسر اور اپنا جانشین مقرر کیا۔ امام کی حجت کو چھپانا ابتدائی اسلام کی طرح ہے جب مناسب وقت آنے تک اسلام کو ظاہر نہیں کیا گیا تھا۔
summaries.zh: 伊玛目·巴基尔（愿主赐他平安）教导什叶追随者如何使用权力章（97章）和烟章（44:1-3）作为伊玛目制度的证据。通过对话，他证明先知没有在未指定继承人的情况下离世，而阿里被指定为《古兰经》的唯一权威解释者。伊玛目真相的隐藏类似于伊斯兰早期秘密传播的时期，直到合适的时机到来方才显现。

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مثل السند السابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/86)
text: يَا مَعْشَرَ الشِّيعَةِ خَاصِمُوا بِسُورَةِ إِنَّا أَنْزَلْنَاهُ تَفْلُجُوا فَوَ اللَّهِ إِنَّهَا لَحُجَّةُ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى عَلَى الْخَلْقِ بَعْدَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ إِنَّهَا لَسَيِّدَةُ دِينِكُمْ وَ إِنَّهَا لَغَايَةُ عِلْمِنَا

يَا مَعْشَرَ الشِّيعَةِ خَاصِمُوا بِ حم وَ الْكِتابِ الْمُبِينِ إِنَّا أَنْزَلْناهُ فِي لَيْلَةٍ مُبارَكَةٍ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنْذِرِينَ فَإِنَّهَا لِوُلَاةِ الْأَمْرِ خَاصَّةً بَعْدَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )

يَا مَعْشَرَ الشِّيعَةِ يَقُولُ اللَّهُ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى وَ إِنْ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ إِلَّا خَلا فِيها نَذِيرٌ قِيلَ يَا أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ نَذِيرُهَا مُحَمَّدٌ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) قَالَ صَدَقْتَ فَهَلْ كَانَ نَذِيرٌ وَ هُوَ حَيٌّ مِنَ الْبِعْثَةِ فِي أَقْطَارِ الْأَرْضِ فَقَالَ السَّائِلُ لَا قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) أَ رَأَيْتَ بَعِيثَهُ أَ لَيْسَ نَذِيرَهُ كَمَا أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فِي بِعْثَتِهِ مِنَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ نَذِيرٌ فَقَالَ بَلَى قَالَ فَكَذَلِكَ لَمْ يَمُتْ مُحَمَّدٌ إِلَّا وَ لَهُ بَعِيثٌ نَذِيرٌ

قَالَ فَإِنْ قُلْتُ لَا فَقَدْ ضَيَّعَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَنْ فِي أَصْلَابِ الرِّجَالِ مِنْ أُمَّتِهِ قَالَ وَ مَا يَكْفِيهِمُ الْقُرْآنُ قَالَ بَلَى إِنْ وَجَدُوا لَهُ مُفَسِّراً قَالَ وَ مَا فَسَّرَهُ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) قَالَ بَلَى قَدْ فَسَّرَهُ لِرَجُلٍ وَاحِدٍ وَ فَسَّرَ لِلْأُمَّةِ شَأْنَ ذَلِكَ الرَّجُلِ وَ هُوَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ( عليه السلام )

قَالَ السَّائِلُ يَا أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ كَانَ هَذَا أَمْرٌ خَاصٌّ لَا يَحْتَمِلُهُ الْعَامَّةُ قَالَ أَبَى اللَّهُ أَنْ يُعْبَدَ إِلَّا سِرّاً حَتَّى يَأْتِيَ إِبَّانُ أَجَلِهِ الَّذِي يَظْهَرُ فِيهِ دِينُهُ كَمَا أَنَّهُ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ مَعَ خَدِيجَةَ مُسْتَتِراً حَتَّى أُمِرَ بِالْإِعْلَانِ

قَالَ السَّائِلُ يَنْبَغِي لِصَاحِبِ هَذَا الدِّينِ أَنْ يَكْتُمَ قَالَ أَ وَ مَا كَتَمَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَوْمَ أَسْلَمَ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) حَتَّى ظَهَرَ أَمْرُهُ قَالَ بَلَى قَالَ فَكَذَلِكَ أَمْرُنَا حَتَّى يَبْلُغَ الْكِتَابُ أَجَلَهُ .

en.hubeali: And from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘O group of the Shias! Argue by (utilising) the Chapter [97:1] We have indeed revealed this, you would be winning, for by Allahazwj, it is a Proof of Allahazwj Blessed and High upon the creatures, after Rasool-Allahsaww, and it is a Chief of your Religion, and it is a peak of ourasws teachings.

O group of the Shias! Argue by (utilizing) [44:1] Ha Mim! [44:2] I swear by the Clarifying Book [44:3] Surely We Revealed it on a Blessed Night surely We are ever Warning, for these are for the Mastersasws of the Command (Wali Al-Amr) in particular after Rasool-Allahsaww.

O group of the Shias! Allahazwj Blessed and High is Saying [35:24] and there is not a community but a warner has gone among them’. It was said, ‘O Abu Ja’farasws! It – the warner is Muhammadsaww’. Heasws said: ‘You speak the truth. So was there a warner from the Sent ones in the horizons of the earth while hesaww was alive?’ So the questioner said, ‘No’. Abu Ja’farasws said: ‘What is your view, had Heazwj Sent him, wouldn’t he be Hisazwj warner just as Rasool-Allahsaww was during Hisazwj Sending from Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic as a warner?’ So he said, ‘Yes’. Heasws said: ‘Similar to that, Muhammadsaww did not pass away except that there was for himsaww, a Sent warner’.

He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Supposing I<sup>asws</sup> were to say ‘no’, so Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> would have wasted the ones in the loins of the men from his<sup>saww</sup> community’ (Muslims to be born until the Hereafter). He said, ‘And the Quran does not suffice them?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes (it would), if they were to find an interpreter for it’. He said, ‘And didn’t Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> interpret it?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, he<sup>saww</sup> had interpreted it to one man, and he<sup>saww</sup> explained the glory of that man to the community, and he is Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Abu Talib<sup>asws</sup>’.

The questioner said, ‘O Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>! This was a special matter, the generality (of the people) do not carry it’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Refused that He<sup>azwj</sup> be worshipped except for secretly until there came the period during which His<sup>azwj</sup> Religion could be Manifested, just as it as concealed when Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> was with Syeda Khadeeja<sup>as</sup> until he<sup>saww</sup> was Commanded with the proclamation’.

The questioner said, ‘Is it befitting for the Master of this Religion that he<sup>asws</sup> conceals?’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Or did not Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Abu Talib<sup>asws</sup> conceal the day he<sup>asws</sup> professed Islam along with Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> until his<sup>saww</sup> matter was manifested?’ He said, ‘Yes’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Similar to that is our<sup>asws</sup> matter, until the prescribed term comes up’.
en.sarwar: 5. Through the same chain of narrators it is narrated from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following. “Ali (a.s.) would say very often, “(What for) al-Taymies and al-‘Adawies have gathered around the Messenger of Allah (s.a.). He, the Messenger of Allah, would read, “We have revealed it on the Night of Determination” very humbly and tearfully. They (al-Taymi and al-‘Adwi) would say, “How intense is the tenderness that this chapter causes to your heart.” The Messenger of Allah would say, “It is because what my eyes see and my heart has stored and for what the heart of this (Ali (a.s.) will experience after me.” They would ask, “What is it that you have seen and what is it that he will experience?” The narrator has said that he would write for the two on the soil, “On this Night, the angels and the spirit descend by the permission of their Lord with His decree (to determine everyone’s destiny).” [97:4] The narrator has said that he, the Messenger of Allah would say, “Has anything else left (untold) after of Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, All matters?” The two would say, “No, nothing is left untold.” He then would ask them, “Do you know to who it will be revealed?” The two would say, “To you, O the Messenger of Allah.” He then would say, “Will there be the Night of Determination after me?” The two would say, “Yes, there will be that night.” He then would ask, “To who (the angels and the Spirit will come)?” The two would say, “We do not know.” He then would hold my head and say, “If the two of you do not know now you must know, he is this after me.” The narrator has said that it is certain that the two would know that night, after the Messenger of Allah, because of the sever apprehension that they would go through.”

text: لَقَدْ خَلَقَ اللَّهُ جَلَّ ذِكْرُهُ لَيْلَةَ الْقَدْرِ أَوَّلَ مَا خَلَقَ الدُّنْيَا وَ لَقَدْ خَلَقَ فِيهَا أَوَّلَ نَبِيٍّ يَكُونُ وَ أَوَّلَ وَصِيٍّ يَكُونُ وَ لَقَدْ قَضَى أَنْ يَكُونَ فِي كُلِّ سَنَةٍ لَيْلَةٌ يَهْبِطُ فِيهَا بِتَفْسِيرِ الْأُمُورِ إِلَى مِثْلِهَا مِنَ السَّنَةِ الْمُقْبِلَةِ

مَنْ جَحَدَ ذَلِكَ فَقَدْ رَدَّ عَلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عِلْمَهُ لِأَنَّهُ لَا يَقُومُ الْأَنْبِيَاءُ وَ الرُّسُلُ وَ الْمُحَدَّثُونَ إِلَّا أَنْ تَكُونَ عَلَيْهِمْ حُجَّةٌ بِمَا يَأْتِيهِمْ فِي تِلْكَ اللَّيْلَةِ مَعَ الْحُجَّةِ الَّتِي يَأْتِيهِمْ بِهَا جَبْرَئِيلُ ( عليه السلام )

قُلْتُ وَ الْمُحَدَّثُونَ أَيْضاً يَأْتِيهِمْ جَبْرَئِيلُ أَوْ غَيْرُهُ مِنَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ أَمَّا الْأَنْبِيَاءُ وَ الرُّسُلُ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمْ فَلَا شَكَّ وَ لَا بُدَّ لِمَنْ سِوَاهُمْ مِنْ أَوَّلِ يَوْمٍ خُلِقَتْ فِيهِ الْأَرْضُ إِلَى آخِرِ فَنَاءِ الدُّنْيَا أَنْ تَكُونَ عَلَى أَهْلِ الْأَرْضِ حُجَّةٌ يَنْزِلُ ذَلِكَ فِي تِلْكَ اللَّيْلَةِ إِلَى مَنْ أَحَبَّ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ

وَ ايْمُ اللَّهِ لَقَدْ نَزَلَ الرُّوحُ وَ الْمَلَائِكَةُ بِالْأَمْرِ فِي لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ عَلَى آدَمَ وَ ايْمُ اللَّهِ مَا مَاتَ آدَمُ إِلَّا وَ لَهُ وَصِيٌّ وَ كُلُّ مَنْ بَعْدَ آدَمَ مِنَ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ قَدْ أَتَاهُ الْأَمْرُ فِيهَا وَ وَضَعَ لِوَصِيِّهِ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ وَ ايْمُ اللَّهِ إِنْ كَانَ النَّبِيُّ لَيُؤْمَرُ فِيمَا يَأْتِيهِ مِنَ الْأَمْرِ فِي تِلْكَ اللَّيْلَةِ مِنْ آدَمَ إِلَى مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أَنْ أَوْصِ إِلَى فُلَانٍ

وَ لَقَدْ قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي كِتَابِهِ لِوُلَاةِ الْأَمْرِ مِنْ بَعْدِ مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) خَاصَّةً وَعَدَ اللَّهُ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا مِنْكُمْ وَ عَمِلُوا الصَّالِحاتِ لَيَسْتَخْلِفَنَّهُمْ فِي الْأَرْضِ كَمَا اسْتَخْلَفَ الَّذِينَ مِنْ قَبْلِهِمْ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ فَأُولئِكَ هُمُ الْفاسِقُونَ

يَقُولُ أَسْتَخْلِفُكُمْ لِعِلْمِي وَ دِينِي وَ عِبَادَتِي بَعْدَ نَبِيِّكُمْ كَمَا اسْتَخْلَفَ وُصَاةَ آدَمَ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ حَتَّى يَبْعَثَ النَّبِيَّ الَّذِي يَلِيهِ يَعْبُدُونَنِي لا يُشْرِكُونَ بِي شَيْئاً يَقُولُ يَعْبُدُونَنِي بِإِيمَانٍ لَا نَبِيَّ بَعْدَ مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَمَنْ قَالَ غَيْرَ ذَلِكَ فَأُولئِكَ هُمُ الْفاسِقُونَ

فَقَدْ مَكَّنَ وُلَاةَ الْأَمْرِ بَعْدَ مُحَمَّدٍ بِالْعِلْمِ وَ نَحْنُ هُمْ فَاسْأَلُونَا فَإِنْ صَدَقْنَاكُمْ فَأَقِرُّوا وَ مَا أَنْتُمْ بِفَاعِلِينَ أَمَّا عِلْمُنَا فَظَاهِرٌ وَ أَمَّا إِبَّانُ أَجَلِنَا الَّذِي يَظْهَرُ فِيهِ الدِّينُ مِنَّا حَتَّى لَا يَكُونَ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ اخْتِلَافٌ فَإِنَّ لَهُ أَجَلًا مِنْ مَمَرِّ اللَّيَالِي وَ الْأَيَّامِ إِذَا أَتَى ظَهَرَ وَ كَانَ الْأَمْرُ وَاحِداً

وَ ايْمُ اللَّهِ لَقَدْ قُضِيَ الْأَمْرُ أَنْ لَا يَكُونَ بَيْنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ اخْتِلَافٌ وَ لِذَلِكَ جَعَلَهُمْ شُهَدَاءَ عَلَى النَّاسِ لِيَشْهَدَ مُحَمَّدٌ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) عَلَيْنَا وَ لِنَشْهَدَ عَلَى شِيعَتِنَا وَ لِتَشْهَدَ شِيعَتُنَا عَلَى النَّاسِ أَبَى اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَنْ يَكُونَ فِي حُكْمِهِ اخْتِلَافٌ أَوْ بَيْنَ أَهْلِ عِلْمِهِ تَنَاقُضٌ

ثُمَّ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فَضْلُ إِيمَانِ الْمُؤْمِنِ بِجُمْلَةِ إِنَّا أَنْزَلْنَاهُ وَ بِتَفْسِيرِهَا عَلَى مَنْ لَيْسَ مِثْلَهُ فِي الْإِيمَانِ بِهَا كَفَضْلِ الْإِنْسَانِ عَلَى الْبَهَائِمِ وَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لَيَدْفَعُ بِالْمُؤْمِنِينَ بِهَا عَنِ الْجَاحِدِينَ لَهَا فِي الدُّنْيَا لِكَمَالِ عَذَابِ الْآخِرَةِ لِمَنْ عَلِمَ أَنَّهُ لَا يَتُوبُ مِنْهُمْ مَا يَدْفَعُ بِالْمُجَاهِدِينَ عَنِ الْقَاعِدِينَ وَ لَا أَعْلَمُ أَنَّ فِي هَذَا الزَّمَانِ جِهَاداً إِلَّا الْحَجَّ وَ الْعُمْرَةَ وَ الْجِوَارَ .

en.hubeali: And from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘Allahazwj had Created the Night of Pre-determination (Laylat Al-Qadr) before having Created the world, and Had Created regarding it the first Prophetas and the first successoras who would happen to be, and had Ordained that there would happen to be a night during every year in which would descend the interpretation of the affairs up to its like from the next year.

The one who rejects that so he has rebutted against Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic of Hisazwj Knowledge, because the Prophetsas and the Rasoolsas and the Muhaddisounasws cannot be standing except if there happens to be an argument upon themasws with what is Given to themasws during that Night along with the Authority which Jibraeelas comes with to themasws’.

I said, ‘And the Muhaddisoun as well, Does Jibraeelas comes to them or someone else from the Angels?’ Heasws said: ‘As for the Prophetsas and the Rasoolsas, so there is no doubt, and it is inevitable for the ones besides themas, from the first day in which the earth was Created up to the last annihilation of the world, that there would happen to be a Divine Authority upon the people of the earth, that would descend during that very Night unto the most beloved of Hisazwj servants.

And Iasws swear by Allahazwj! The Spirit and the Angels had descended during the Night of Pre-determination (Laylat Al-Qadr) unto Adamas. And Iasws swear by Allahazwj! Adamas did not die except there was a successoras for himas, and (for) everyone from the Prophetsas after Adamas, that Command had come to himas during it, and was placed for hisas successoras from after himas. And Iasws swear by Allahazwj! It was always so that the Prophetas was Commanded among what came to Himas from the Commands during that Night, from Adamas to Muhammadsaww, that heas bequeaths to so and so.

And Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic has Said in Hisazwj Book to the Mastersasws of the Command after Muhammadsaww in particular [24:55] Allah has Promised to those of you who believe and do righteous deeds that He will Make them to be Caliphs in the earth as He Made Caliphs those who were before them – up to Hisazwj Words these it is who are the transgressors.

Heazwj is Saying: “Iazwj will be Making Caliphs for Myazwj Knowledge, and Myazwj Religion, and Myazwj servants after your Prophetas just as Iazwj had Made Caliphs of the successorsas of Adamas from after himas until the Prophetsaww was Sent, those that followed himazwj that they shall worship Me, not associating anything with Me”. Heazwj is Saying: “Worship Meazwj with the belief that there will be no Prophetsaww after Muhammadsaww, so the one who says other than that, these are the ones who are the transgressors”.

So He<sup>azwj</sup> has Enabled the Masters<sup>asws</sup> of the Command (Wali Al-Amr) after Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> with the Knowledge, and we<sup>asws</sup> are they, therefore ask us<sup>asws</sup>, so if we<sup>asws</sup> ratify you, be acknowledging, and you will not be doing so. As for our<sup>asws</sup> knowledge, so it is apparent, and as for the appearance of our<sup>asws</sup> era in which the Religion would be manifested from us<sup>asws</sup> until there does not happen to be any differing between the people, so there is a term for it from the passing of the nights and the days. When it comes, it would be manifested, and it would be one command.

And I<sup>asws</sup> swear by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! The matter has been Ordained that there will not be any differing between the Momineen, and due to that, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Made them to be the witnesses upon the people, for Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> to be a witness upon us<sup>asws</sup> and for us<sup>asws</sup> to be a witness upon our<sup>asws</sup> Shias, and for our<sup>asws</sup> Shias to be a witness upon the (generality of the) people. Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Refuses that there should happen to be a differing in His<sup>azwj</sup> Judgment, or between the people<sup>asws</sup> of His<sup>azwj</sup> Knowledge, there be a contradiction’.

Then Abu Ja’farasws said: ‘The merit of the Eman of the Momin in total is [97:1] We have indeed revealed this (Chapter 97) and in its interpretation, upon the one who is not like him in the Eman with it, is like the merit of the human being upon the beasts. And Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Defends with the believers in it from the rejecters of it in the world, in order to perfect the Punishment of the Hereafter for the ones Heazwj Knows there is no repentance from them, as Heazwj Defends by the fighters from the sitters. And Iasws do not know that in this era if there is a Jihad other than the (performance) of the Hajj, and the Umra, and the (good) neighbourliness’.
en.sarwar: 6. Through the same chain of narrators it is narrated from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following. “O the community of of our followers, debate the opposition by means of chapter ninety seven of th Holy Quran. We have revealed on the Night of Determination, you will gain victory. I swear by Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, that this is the authoritative evidence from Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, against the creatures after the Messenger of Allah. This is the lead evidence in your religion. It certainly, is the goal of our knowledge. “O community of our followers, (the Shi‘a) debate the opposition by means of, “I swear by the illustrious Book [44:2] that We have revealed the Quran on a blessed night to warn mankind.” [44:3] This verse is exclusively about the people who possess Divine authority after the Messenger of Allah .” “O cmmunity of our followers, Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, has said, “. . No nation who lived before was left without a Warner.. .”[35:24] A person then said, “O abu Ja‘far, the Warner is Muhammad (s.a)” The Imam (a.s.) said, “What you just said is true.Was there a Warner for the differennt parts of the land from those he had commissioned, while he (the Messenger of Allah ) was living?” The person questioning said, “No, there was no Warner.” Abu Ja‘far (a.s.) then said, “Consider the person he comissioned. Was he not his Warner, just as the Messenger of Allah, in being comissioned from Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, was a Warner?” The person said, “Yes, it is true.” The Imam (a.s.) said, “In the same way Muhammad (s.a) did not die without having someone as his delegate and Warner.” The Imam (a.s.) said, “If you would say, “No, it would mean that the Messenger of Allah has lost his followers who are stil to be born.” The person then said, “Is the Holy Quran not enough for them?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “It is enough only if they find A number of our people has narrated from interpreter for it.” The person then assked, “Has the Messenger of Allah not interpreted it?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “Yes, he has done so just for one man and he has interpreted the conditionns of that man for his followers. That man is Ali ibn abu Talib (a.s.).” The man asking the question then said, “O abu Ja‘far (a.s.), this was a special matter. Common people are not able to bear it. The Imam (a.s.) ssaid, “Allah, disdains not being worshipped in secrecy until the time comes to when His religion becomes public. It is just as the Messenger of Allah and Khadija would not make their religion public until they were commanded to do so.” The man asking question then said, “Is it proper for the author of this religion to to hide?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “Did Ali ibn abu Talib not hide his religion on the day he became a Muslim with the Messenger of Allah until his matter became public?” He said, “Yes, that was the case.” The Imam (a.s.) then said, “So also is our case (the publicity of Divine authotrity) until the appointed time will come.”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: السند مشترك - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/90)
text: رَجُلٌ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَا ابْنَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ لَا تَغْضَبْ عَلَيَّ قَالَ لِمَا ذَا قَالَ لِمَا أُرِيدُ أَنْ أَسْأَلَكَ عَنْهُ قَالَ قُلْ قَالَ وَ لَا تَغْضَبُ قَالَ وَ لَا أَغْضَبُ قَالَ أَ رَأَيْتَ قَوْلَكَ فِي لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ وَ تَنَزُّلِ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ الرُّوحِ فِيهَا إِلَى الْأَوْصِيَاءِ يَأْتُونَهُمْ بِأَمْرٍ لَمْ يَكُنْ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) قَدْ عَلِمَهُ أَوْ يَأْتُونَهُمْ بِأَمْرٍ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) يَعْلَمُهُ وَ قَدْ عَلِمْتُ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَاتَ وَ لَيْسَ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ شَيْ‏ءٌ إِلَّا وَ عَلِيٌّ ( عليه السلام ) لَهُ وَاعٍ

قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) مَا لِي وَ لَكَ أَيُّهَا الرَّجُلُ وَ مَنْ أَدْخَلَكَ عَلَيَّ قَالَ أَدْخَلَنِي عَلَيْكَ الْقَضَاءُ لِطَلَبِ الدِّينِ قَالَ فَافْهَمْ مَا أَقُولُ لَكَ إِنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَمَّا أُسْرِيَ بِهِ لَمْ يَهْبِطْ حَتَّى أَعْلَمَهُ اللَّهُ جَلَّ ذِكْرُهُ عِلْمَ مَا قَدْ كَانَ وَ مَا سَيَكُونُ وَ كَانَ كَثِيرٌ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ ذَلِكَ جُمَلًا يَأْتِي تَفْسِيرُهَا فِي لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ وَ كَذَلِكَ كَانَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَدْ عَلِمَ جُمَلَ الْعِلْمِ وَ يَأْتِي تَفْسِيرُهُ فِي لَيَالِي الْقَدْرِ كَمَا كَانَ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )

قَالَ السَّائِلُ أَ وَ مَا كَانَ فِي الْجُمَّلِ تَفْسِيرٌ قَالَ بَلَى وَ لَكِنَّهُ إِنَّمَا يَأْتِي بِالْأَمْرِ مِنَ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فِي لَيَالِي الْقَدْرِ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ وَ إِلَى الْأَوْصِيَاءِ افْعَلْ كَذَا وَ كَذَا لِأَمْرٍ قَدْ كَانُوا عَلِمُوهُ أُمِرُوا كَيْفَ يَعْمَلُونَ فِيهِ قُلْتُ فَسِّرْ لِي هَذَا قَالَ لَمْ يَمُتْ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) إِلَّا حَافِظاً لِجُمْلَةِ الْعِلْمِ وَ تَفْسِيرِهِ

قُلْتُ فَالَّذِي كَانَ يَأْتِيهِ فِي لَيَالِي الْقَدْرِ عِلْمُ مَا هُوَ قَالَ الْأَمْرُ وَ الْيُسْرُ فِيمَا كَانَ قَدْ عَلِمَ قَالَ السَّائِلُ فَمَا يَحْدُثُ لَهُمْ فِي لَيَالِي الْقَدْرِ عِلْمٌ سِوَى مَا عَلِمُوا قَالَ هَذَا مِمَّا أُمِرُوا بِكِتْمَانِهِ وَ لَا يَعْلَمُ تَفْسِيرَ مَا سَأَلْتَ عَنْهُ إِلَّا اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ
قَالَ السَّائِلُ فَهَلْ يَعْلَمُ الْأَوْصِيَاءُ مَا لَا يَعْلَمُ الْأَنْبِيَاءُ قَالَ لَا وَ كَيْفَ يَعْلَمُ وَصِيٌّ غَيْرَ عِلْمِ مَا أُوصِيَ إِلَيْهِ

قَالَ السَّائِلُ فَهَلْ يَسَعُنَا أَنْ نَقُولَ إِنَّ أَحَداً مِنَ الْوُصَاةِ يَعْلَمُ مَا لَا يَعْلَمُ الْآخَرُ قَالَ لَا لَمْ يَمُتْ نَبِيٌّ إِلَّا وَ عِلْمُهُ فِي جَوْفِ وَصِيِّهِ وَ إِنَّمَا تَنَزَّلُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ وَ الرُّوحُ فِي لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ بِالْحُكْمِ الَّذِي يَحْكُمُ بِهِ بَيْنَ الْعِبَادِ

قَالَ السَّائِلُ وَ مَا كَانُوا عَلِمُوا ذَلِكَ الْحُكْمَ قَالَ بَلَى قَدْ عَلِمُوهُ وَ لَكِنَّهُمْ لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ إِمْضَاءَ شَيْ‏ءٍ مِنْهُ حَتَّى يُؤْمَرُوا فِي لَيَالِي الْقَدْرِ كَيْفَ يَصْنَعُونَ إِلَى السَّنَةِ الْمُقْبِلَةِ
قَالَ السَّائِلُ يَا أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ لَا أَسْتَطِيعُ إِنْكَارَ هَذَا قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ أَنْكَرَهُ فَلَيْسَ مِنَّا

قَالَ السَّائِلُ يَا أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ أَ رَأَيْتَ النَّبِيَّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) هَلْ كَانَ يَأْتِيهِ فِي لَيَالِي الْقَدْرِ شَيْ‏ءٌ لَمْ يَكُنْ عَلِمَهُ قَالَ لَا يَحِلُّ لَكَ أَنْ تَسْأَلَ عَنْ هَذَا أَمَّا عِلْمُ مَا كَانَ وَ مَا سَيَكُونُ فَلَيْسَ يَمُوتُ نَبِيٌّ وَ لَا وَصِيٌّ إِلَّا وَ الْوَصِيُّ الَّذِي بَعْدَهُ يَعْلَمُهُ أَمَّا هَذَا الْعِلْمُ الَّذِي تَسْأَلُ عَنْهُ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَبَى أَنْ يُطْلِعَ الْأَوْصِيَاءَ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا أَنْفُسَهُمْ

قَالَ السَّائِلُ يَا ابْنَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ كَيْفَ أَعْرِفُ أَنَّ لَيْلَةَ الْقَدْرِ تَكُونُ فِي كُلِّ سَنَةٍ قَالَ إِذَا أَتَى شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ فَاقْرَأْ سُورَةَ الدُّخَانِ فِي كُلِّ لَيْلَةٍ مِائَةَ مَرَّةٍ فَإِذَا أَتَتْ لَيْلَةُ ثَلَاثٍ وَ عِشْرِينَ فَإِنَّكَ نَاظِرٌ إِلَى تَصْدِيقِ الَّذِي سَأَلْتَ عَنْهُ .

en.hubeali: He (the narrator) said,

‘And a man said to Abu Ja’farasws, ‘O sonasws of Rasool-Allahsaww! Do not be angry upon me’. Heasws said: ‘Due to what?’ He said, ‘Due to what I intend to ask youasws’. Heasws said: ‘Say (it)’. He said, ‘And you will not be angry?’ Heasws said: ‘And Iasws will not be angry’. He said, ‘Will youasws consider yourasws words regarding The Night of Pre-determination (Laylat Al-Qadr), that the Angels and the Spirit descend during it unto the successorsasws. Are they coming to themasws with the matters which Rasool-Allahsaww did not happen to have its knowledge, or are they coming to themasws with matters which Rasool-Allahsaww did have the knowledge of it? And I know that Rasool-Allahsaww passed away and there wasn’t anything from hissaww knowledge except that Aliasws was a retainer of it’.

Abu Ja’farasws said: ‘What is it to measws and to you, O man! And who made you come over to measws?’ He Said, ‘The Ordainment made me come over to you seeking the Religion’. Heasws said: ‘Then understand what Iasws am saying to you. When Rasool-Allahsaww was ascended with, hesaww did not come back down until Allahazwj, Majestic is Hisazwj Mention Taught himsaww whatever had happened, and what will be happening, and a lot of hissaww knowledge of that in total, its interpretation came to himsaww during the Night of Pre-determination (Laylat Al-Qadr). And similar to that was Aliasws Bin Abu Talibasws had known the totality of the knowledge, and its interpretation came during a Night of Pre-determination (Laylat Al-Qadr), just as was the case with Rasool-Allahsaww.

The questioner said, ‘Or was there no interpretation for the whole of it?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, but, rather it came with the Commands from Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the Exalted during the Nights of the Pre-determination unto the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> and unto the successors<sup>asws</sup>: “Do such and such for a matter”. They<sup>asws</sup> did have its knowledge. Its Command was how they<sup>asws</sup> should be doing it’. He said, ‘Explain this to me’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> did not pass away except having preserved the totality of the knowledge and its interpretation’.

I said, ‘So the knowledge which he<sup>saww</sup> was Given during the Nights of Pre-determination, what was it?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The Command and the ease regarding what he<sup>saww</sup> had already known’. The questioner said, ‘So whatever newly occurred for them<sup>asws</sup> during the Nights of Pre-determination was knowledge besides what they already knew of?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is from what they<sup>asws</sup> have been Commanded with its concealment, and none know the interpretation of what you asked about except for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic’.

The questioner asked, ‘So do the successors<sup>asws</sup> know what the Prophets<sup>as</sup> did not know?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No. And how can a successor<sup>asws</sup> know other than a knowledge which had been bequeathed to him<sup>asws</sup>?’

The questioner asked, ‘So do we have the leeway that we should be saying that one of the successorsasws knows what the other one does not?’ Heasws said: ‘No. A Prophetas does not pass away except hisas knowledge would be in the inside of hisas successoras, and rather, the Angels and the Spirit descend during a Night of Pre-determination (Laylat Al-Qadr) with the Judgment heasws would be judging with between the servants’.

The questioner said, ‘And was it so that they<sup>asws</sup> knew of that Judgment?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘They<sup>asws</sup> had known it, but they<sup>asws</sup> cannot implement anything from it until they<sup>asws</sup> are Commanded for it during the Nights of Pre-determination how they<sup>asws</sup> should be dealing with it up to the next year’.
The questioner said, ‘O Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, ‘I am not able to deny this’. Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who denies it, so he isn’t from us<sup>asws</sup>’.

The questioner said, ‘O Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>! What is your<sup>asws</sup> view of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>, did anything come to him<sup>saww</sup> during the Nights of Pre-determination which he<sup>saww</sup> did not know of?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not permissible for you that you should be asking about this. As for the knowledge of what had happened and what was going to happen, so neither does a Prophet<sup>as</sup> pass away nor a successor<sup>as</sup>, except that the successor<sup>as</sup> to be after him<sup>as</sup> would know it. As for this knowledge which you asked about, so Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Refuses that the succesors<sup>as</sup> should notify it except upon themselves<sup>as</sup>’.

The questioner said, ‘O sonasws of Rasool-Allahsaww! How can I recognise a Night of Pre-determination (Laylat Al-Qadr) occurring during every year?’ Heasws said: ‘When a Month of Ramazan comes, so recite Surah Al-Dukhhan (Chapter 44) every night one hundred times. So when the night of the twenty third comes, so you shall see the ratification of that which you questioned about’.
en.sarwar: 7. Through the same chain of narrators it is narrated from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following. “Allah, Majestic is Whose mention, created the Night of Determination when He first created the world and created in it the first prophet that would come and the first executor of the will (of prophet) that would come. He decreed that in every year there must be one night in which the interpretation and the clarification of would be sent until another such night in the coming year. Whoever would deny it has certainly rejected the knowledge of Allah, Majestic is Whose mention. It is because the prophets, the Messengers and Muhadditun (spokesmen for Allah) without receiving Divine authority through what comes to them on that night along with the authority that Jibril brings for them (a.s.).” The narrator has said that he asked the Imams (a.s.), “Do the Muhaddithun also experience the coming of Jibril and other angels?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “The prophets and the Messenger (s.a.) certainly, experience it. For the others besides the prophets and the Messenger (s.a.) it is necessary that from the first day the eart h was created to the last of the perishing of world there must the Divine authority for the people of the earth that would come down on that night to the one who would be te most beloved among His servants. I swear by Allah, the spirit and the angels came with the command on the Night of Determination to Adam. I swear by Allah, that Adam did not die until he had the executor of his will. To every prophet after Adam the command came to them on that night and it was assigned to the executor of his will after him. I swear by Allah, if the prophet had to be commanded through that which that came to them on that night from Adam to Muhammad (s.a) to make a will in favor of so and so and that Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, has said in His book to the people who possess Divine after Muhammad (s.a.). “God has promised the righteously striving believers to appoint them as His deputies on earth, as He had appointed those who lived before. He will make the religion that He has chosen for them to stand supreme. He will replace their fear with peace and security so that they will worship God alone and consider no one equal to Him. Whoever becomes an unbeliever after this will be a sinful person.” [24:55] He says that He has made you His deputies in the matter of His knowledge, religion and worship after His Prophet just as Adam made a will to appoint the executor of his will after him until the time Allah sent another prophet. He has said, “so that they will worship God alone and consider no one equal to Him” He has said that you must worship Him with faith in the fact that after Muhammad (s.a.) there is no other prophet. Those who would say otherwise are sinful persons. He has enabled the people who possess Divine authority with knowledge. We are such people. Ask us. If we will acknowledge you then be steadfast but you will not do so. Our knowledge is clear. The appearance of the appointed time for us in which religion will stand supreme through us so much so that there will remain no differences among people for such time there is A number of our people has narrated from appointed time that pass through the nights and days. When that time will come, the command of Allah will be only one. “I swear by Allah, it is already decreed that there will beno differences among the believers and for this reason they are made to witness the deeds of the people so that Muhammad (s.a) will be witness over us and we will be the witness over our followers and our followers will be witness over the people. Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, disdained to let differences take place in His judgment or contradictions to take place among those who possess His knowledge.” Abu Ja‘far (a.s.) then said the following. “The excellence of the faith of a believer because of his accepting, “We have revealed it in the Night of Determination,” and its interpretation, over those who are not like him in the matters of faith in that Night is like the excellence of man over the animals. Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, defends through those who believe in it from those who disbelieve it in this world-- it is to complete the punishment for it in the next life for those whom He knows would not repent from rejecting the same--, just as He defends through those who strive (Jihad) for His cause those who sit comfortably. I do not know if there is any Jihad striving for His cause, these days, other than Hajj, ‘Umra and to be good neighbors”

translations.bn: আবু জাফর (আ.) বললেন: তোমরা কেন দেখছ যে আল্লাহ যাদেরকে গমরাহদের উপর দুর্ভাগ্যের জন্য শয়তানদের সৈন্যবাহিনী থেকে পাঠিয়েছেন তারা ফেরেশতাদের চেয়ে বেশি? বলা হল: হে আবু জাফর! কীভাবে কিছু ফেরেশতাদের চেয়ে বেশি হতে পারে? তিনি বললেন: যেভাবে আল্লাহ ইচ্ছা করেছেন।
translations.de: Abu Ja'far (Friede sei mit ihm) sagte: Warum seht ihr, dass diejenigen, die Allah aus den Heerscharen der Satane zum Unglück über die Irregeleiteten gesandt hat, zahlreicher sind als die Engel, die den Stellvertreter Allahs für Gerechtigkeit unterstützen? Es wurde gesagt: O Abu Ja'far! Wie kann etwas zahlreicher sein als die Engel? Er sagte: Wie Allah es gewollt hat.
translations.en: Abu Ja'far (peace be upon him) said: Why do you see those whom God, Mighty and Majestic, has dispatched for wretchedness upon the people of misguidance from the armies of the Satans and their consorts to be more numerous than what you see of the Caliph of God whom He dispatched for justice and righteousness from among the Angels? It was said: O Abu Ja'far, how can anything be more numerous than the Angels? He said: As God, Mighty and Majestic, has willed.
translations.es: Abu Ja'far (la paz sea con él) dijo: ¿Por qué veis que los enviados por Dios para la desgracia sobre la gente del extravío de las huestes de los Satanes son más numerosos que los ángeles que sostienen al Vicegerente de Dios enviado para la justicia? Se dijo: ¡Oh Abu Ja'far! ¿Cómo puede algo ser más numeroso que los Ángeles? Dijo: Como Dios lo ha querido.
translations.fa: ابوجعفر علیه السلام فرمود: چرا آنچه را که خداوند عزوجل از لشکریان شیاطین و همسرانشان برای بدبختی بر اهل ضلالت فرستاده، بیشتر از ملائکه‌ای می‌بینید که خلیفه خدا را برای عدل و صواب مبعوث کرده؟ گفته شد: ای اباجعفر! چگونه چیزی می‌تواند از ملائکه بیشتر باشد؟ فرمود: آنگونه که خداوند عزوجل اراده کرده.
translations.fr: Abu Ja'far (que la paix soit sur lui) dit : Pourquoi voyez-vous que ceux qu'Allah a envoyés pour le malheur sur les égarés parmi les armées des Satans sont plus nombreux que les Anges qui soutiennent le Calife d'Allah envoyé pour la justice ? Il fut dit : Ô Abu Ja'far ! Comment quelque chose pourrait-il être plus nombreux que les Anges ? Il dit : Comme Allah l'a voulu.
translations.id: Abu Ja'far (a.s.) bersabda: Mengapa kalian melihat mereka yang dikirim Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Mulia untuk kesengsaraan atas orang-orang sesat dari pasukan-pasukan Setan lebih banyak dari malaikat yang mendukung Khalifah Allah yang dikirim untuk keadilan? Dikatakan: Wahai Abu Ja'far, bagaimana mungkin sesuatu bisa lebih banyak dari Malaikat? Beliau berkata: Sebagaimana yang Allah kehendaki.
translations.ru: Абу Джафар (мир ему) сказал: Почему вы видите, что тех, кого Аллах послал для несчастья на людей заблуждения из армий шайтанов, больше, чем ангелов, поддерживающих Наместника Аллаха для справедливости? Было сказано: О Абу Джафар! Как что-то может быть многочисленнее ангелов? Он сказал: Как пожелал Аллах.
translations.tr: Ebu Cafer (a.s.) buyurdu: Allah Azze ve Celle'nin Şeytanların ordularından ve eşlerinden bozguncular üzerine şekavete gönderdiği varlıkları, Allah'ın adalete ve doğruluğa gönderdiği Halifesini destekleyen meleklerden daha çok gördüğünüze bakıyorum? Denildi ki: Ey Ebu Cafer, nasıl olur da bir şey meleklerden daha çok olabilir? Buyurdu: Allah Azze ve Celle'nin dilediği kadar.
translations.ur: ابو جعفر علیہ السلام نے فرمایا: تم کیوں دیکھتے ہو کہ جنہیں اللہ عزوجل نے بدبختی کے لیے گمراہوں پر شیاطین کے لشکروں اور ان کے جوڑوں سے بھیجا ہے وہ اس سے زیادہ ہیں جو تم خلیفۃ اللہ سے دیکھتے ہو جسے اللہ نے عدل اور صواب کے لیے ملائکہ سے بھیجا؟ عرض کیا گیا: اے ابا جعفر! کیسے ہو سکتا ہے کہ کوئی چیز ملائکہ سے زیادہ ہو؟ آپ نے فرمایا: جیسا اللہ عزوجل نے چاہا۔
translations.zh: 艾布·贾法尔（愿主赐他平安）说：你们为何看到真主从撒旦军队中派去让迷误之人受苦的比支持真主代理人行正义的天使还多？有人说：艾布·贾法尔啊！怎么可能有什么比天使还多？他说：就像真主所意欲的那样。

translations.bn: প্রশ্নকারী বলল: হে আবু জাফর! যদি আমি এই হাদিস কিছু শিয়াকে বলি, তারা তা অস্বীকার করবে। তিনি বললেন: তারা কীভাবে অস্বীকার করবে? সে বলল: তারা বলবে ফেরেশতারা শয়তানদের চেয়ে বেশি। তিনি বললেন: তুমি সত্য বলেছ। আমার কথা বুঝো: এমন কোনো দিন ও রাত নেই যেখানে জিন ও শয়তানরা গমরাহির ইমামদের জিয়ারত না করে এবং সমসংখ্যক ফেরেশতা হুদার ইমামের জিয়ারত করে — যতক্ষণ না লাইলাতুল কদর আসে, তখন ফেরেশতারা ওলিউল আমরের কাছে নাযিল হয় আল্লাহর নির্ধারিত সংখ্যায়।
translations.de: Der Fragesteller sagte: O Abu Ja'far! Wenn ich diesen Hadith einigen Schiiten erzählen würde, würden sie ihn ablehnen. Er sagte: Wie würden sie ihn ablehnen? Er sagte: Sie würden sagen, dass die Engel zahlreicher sind als die Satane. Er sagte: Du hast Recht. Verstehe, was ich sage: Es gibt keinen Tag und keine Nacht, in der nicht alle Dschinnen und Satane die Imame der Irre besuchen und eine gleich große Anzahl von Engeln den Imam der Führung besucht — bis die Nacht der Bestimmung kommt, dann steigen Engel zum Herrn des Befehls herab in der Anzahl, die Allah aus den Satanen geschaffen oder bestimmt hat.
translations.en: The questioner said: O Abu Ja'far, if I were to narrate this hadith to some of the Shi'a, they would deny it. He said: How would they deny it? He said: They would say that the Angels are more numerous than the Satans. He said: You are right. Understand from me what I am saying: there is not a single day or night except that all the Jinn and Satans visit the imams of misguidance, and an equal number of Angels visits the Imam of Guidance — until when the Night of Power (Laylat al-Qadr) comes, Angels descend during it to the Master of the Command in a number that God, Mighty and Majestic, has created — or said: destined — from among the Satans as their equal number.
translations.es: El interrogador dijo: ¡Oh Abu Ja'far! Si contara este hadith a algunos chiítas, lo negarían. Dijo: ¿Cómo lo negarían? Dijo: Dirían que los Ángeles son más numerosos que los Satanes. Dijo: Tienes razón. Comprende lo que digo: No hay un solo día ni una sola noche en que todos los genios y Satanes no visiten a los imanes del extravío, y un número equivalente de Ángeles no visite al Imam de la Guía — hasta que llegue la Noche del Destino, entonces descienden Ángeles al Señor del Mando en el número que Dios ha creado o predestinado de entre los Satanes.
translations.fa: سائل گفت: ای اباجعفر! اگر این حدیث را برای برخی شیعیان نقل کنم، آن را انکار می‌کنند. فرمود: چگونه انکار می‌کنند؟ گفت: می‌گویند ملائکه علیهم السلام از شیاطین بیشترند. فرمود: راست گفتی. از من بفهم: هیچ روز و شبی نیست مگر آنکه تمام جن و شیاطین ائمه ضلالت را زیارت می‌کنند و به تعداد آنها از ملائکه، امام هدی را زیارت می‌کنند، تا آنکه شب قدر فرارسد و در آن ملائکه به سوی ولی امر نازل شوند — به تعداد آنچه خداوند از شیاطین آفریده یا مقدر کرده.
translations.fr: Le questionneur dit : Ô Abu Ja'far ! Si je rapportais ce hadith à certains shi'ites, ils le nieraient. Il dit : Comment le nieraient-ils ? Il dit : Ils diraient que les Anges sont plus nombreux que les Satans. Il dit : Tu as raison. Comprends ce que je dis : Il n'y a pas un seul jour ni une seule nuit sans que tous les djinns et les Satans ne rendent visite aux imams de l'égarement, et un nombre équivalent d'Anges ne rende visite à l'Imam de la Guidance — jusqu'à la Nuit du Destin, alors descendent des Anges vers le Maître de l'Ordre dans le nombre qu'Allah a créé ou destiné parmi les Satans.
translations.id: Penanya berkata: Wahai Abu Ja'far, jika aku menceritakan hadits ini kepada sebagian Syi'ah, mereka pasti mengingkarinya. Beliau berkata: Bagaimana mereka mengingkarinya? Dia berkata: Mereka mengatakan bahwa Malaikat lebih banyak dari Setan. Beliau berkata: Kamu benar. Pahamilah: Tidak ada satu hari pun dan satu malam pun melainkan seluruh jin dan Setan mengunjungi imam-imam kesesatan, dan jumlah yang sama dari Malaikat mengunjungi Imam Petunjuk — hingga Lailatul Qadar tiba, maka turunlah Malaikat kepada Wali al-Amr dalam jumlah yang Allah ciptakan atau takdirkan dari Setan.
translations.ru: Вопрошавший сказал: О Абу Джафар! Если бы я рассказал этот хадис некоторым шиитам, они бы его отвергли. Он сказал: Как бы они его отвергли? Он сказал: Они бы сказали, что ангелы многочисленнее шайтанов. Он сказал: Ты прав. Пойми, что я говорю: Нет ни одного дня и ни одной ночи, чтобы все джинны и шайтаны не посещали имамов заблуждения, и равное им число ангелов не посещало Имама Наставления — до Ночи Предопределения, когда нисходят ангелы к Властителю Дела в числе, которое Аллах сотворил или предопределил из шайтанов.
translations.tr: Soran kişi dedi ki: Ey Ebu Cafer, bu hadisi şiilerden bazılarına anlatsam onu inkâr ederler. Buyurdu: Onu nasıl inkâr ederler? Dedi ki: Meleklerin şeytanlardan daha çok olduğunu söylerler. Buyurdu: Doğru söyledin. Benden ne söylediğimi anla: Öyle bir gün ve gece yoktur ki tüm cinler ve şeytanlar sapıklık imamlarını ziyaret etmesin ve hidayet İmamını eşit sayıda melek ziyaret etmesin. Kadir Gecesi geldiğinde ise Emir Sahibine melekler iner — Allah'ın onların sayısınca şeytanlardan yarattığı ya da takdir ettiği kadar.
translations.ur: سائل نے کہا: اے ابا جعفر! اگر میں یہ حدیث بعض شیعوں کو بیان کروں تو وہ انکار کریں گے۔ آپ نے فرمایا: کیسے انکار کریں گے؟ اس نے کہا: وہ کہیں گے کہ ملائکہ علیہم السلام شیاطین سے زیادہ ہیں۔ آپ نے فرمایا: تم نے سچ کہا۔ میری بات سمجھو: کوئی دن اور رات ایسا نہیں جس میں تمام جن اور شیاطین ائمہ ضلالت کی زیارت نہ کریں، اور امام ہدی کی زیارت ان کی تعداد کے برابر ملائکہ کریں۔ یہاں تک کہ جب لیلۃ القدر آتی ہے تو اس میں ملائکہ ولی الامر کے پاس نازل ہوتے ہیں — جتنے اللہ نے پیدا کیے یا فرمایا: مقدر کیے — شیاطین میں سے ان کی تعداد کے برابر۔
translations.zh: 问者说：艾布·贾法尔啊！若我把这圣训告诉一些什叶派人，他们会否认它。他说：他们怎么会否认？他说：他们会说天使比撒旦多。他说：你说对了。听我说：没有哪天哪夜，所有精灵和撒旦不去拜访迷误的伊玛目，而等数量的天使拜访引导的伊玛目——直到命运之夜来临，天使降临到管治之主处，数量与真主所创造或注定的撒旦相当。

translations.bn: তারপর তারা গমরাহির ওলির জিয়ারত করে এবং তার কাছে মিথ্যা ও অপবাদ নিয়ে আসে, যতক্ষণে হয়তো সে সকালে উঠে বলে: আমি এটা এটা দেখেছি। কিন্তু ওলিউল আমরকে সে বিষয়ে জিজ্ঞেস করলে তিনি বলতেন: তুমি একটি শয়তান দেখেছ যে তোমাকে এটা এটা বলেছে, যতক্ষণ না তিনি তার ব্যাখ্যা করেন এবং তাকে গমরাহি সম্পর্কে জানান।
translations.de: Dann besuchen sie den Herrn der Irre und bringen ihm Erfindungen und Lügen, bis er vielleicht am Morgen aufwacht und sagt: Ich sah dies und das. Wenn aber jemand den Herrn des Befehls darüber befragen würde, würde er sagen: Du sahst einen Satan, der dich über dies und das informierte, bis er es für ihn interpretiert und ihn über die Irre kennt, auf der er sich befindet.
translations.en: Then they visit the master of misguidance and bring him fabrications and lies, until perhaps he wakes up in the morning saying: I saw such-and-such. But if one were to ask the Master of the Command about that, he would say: You saw a Satan who informed you of such-and-such, until he would interpret it for him and make known to him the misguidance upon which he stands.
translations.es: Luego visitarán al señor del extravío y le traerán fabricaciones y mentiras, hasta que quizás amanezca diciendo: He visto tal y tal cosa. Pero si alguien preguntara al Señor del Mando al respecto, diría: Has visto un Satán que te informó de tal y tal cosa, hasta que lo interpretaría para él y le daría a conocer el extravío en que se encuentra.
translations.fa: سپس آنها ولی ضلالت را زیارت می‌کنند و برایش دروغ و افک می‌آورند تا شاید صبح برخیزد و بگوید: چنین و چنان دیدم. اگر از ولی امر درباره آن پرسیده شود می‌گوید: شیطانی دیدی که چنین و چنان به تو خبر داد، تا آنکه تفسیرش کند و ضلالتی را که بر آن است به او بشناساند.
translations.fr: Ensuite ils rendent visite au maître de l'égarement et lui apportent des fabrications et des mensonges, jusqu'à ce que peut-être il se réveille le matin en disant : J'ai vu ceci et cela. Mais si quelqu'un demandait au Maître de l'Ordre à ce sujet, il dirait : Tu as vu un Satan qui t'a informé de ceci et cela, jusqu'à ce qu'il l'interprète pour lui et lui fasse connaître l'égarement sur lequel il se trouve.
translations.id: Kemudian mereka mengunjungi wali kesesatan dan membawakan kepadanya kebohongan dan kedustaan, sehingga mungkin dia bangun pagi berkata: Aku melihat ini dan itu. Namun jika seseorang bertanya kepada Wali al-Amr tentang hal itu, beliau akan berkata: Kamu melihat setan yang memberitahumu ini dan itu, sampai dia menafsirkannya dan memberitahunya kesesatan yang dia berada di atasnya.
translations.ru: Затем они посещают властителя заблуждения и приносят ему измышления и ложь, пока, возможно, он не проснётся утром, говоря: Я видел то-то и то-то. Но если бы кто-нибудь спросил Властителя Дела об этом, он бы сказал: Ты видел шайтана, который поведал тебе то-то и то-то, пока не истолкует ему это и не сообщит ему о заблуждении, на котором он находится.
translations.tr: Ardından sapıklık velisini ziyaret ederler ve ona iftiralar ve yalanlar getirirler; belki sabahleyin kalkıp 'şunu şunu gördüm' der. Emir Sahibine bu konuda sorulsaydı şöyle derdi: Sana şunu şunu haber veren bir şeytan gördün, ta ki ona tefsir edene kadar ve üzerinde bulunduğu sapıklığı ona bildirene kadar.
translations.ur: پھر وہ ولی ضلالت کی زیارت کرتے ہیں اور اسے جھوٹ اور افک لے آتے ہیں، یہاں تک کہ شاید وہ صبح اٹھ کر کہے: میں نے یہ اور یہ دیکھا۔ اگر کوئی ولی الامر سے اس بارے میں پوچھے تو وہ کہیں گے: تم نے ایک شیطان دیکھا جس نے تمہیں یہ اور یہ بتایا، یہاں تک کہ وہ اس کی تفسیر کریں اور اسے اس گمراہی سے آگاہ کریں جس پر وہ ہے۔
translations.zh: 然后它们拜访迷误之主，带来捏造和谎言，直到他清晨起来说：我看到了如此这般。若有人就此询问管治之主，他会说：你看到了一个撒旦，它告诉你如此这般，直到他为他解释，让他了解他所在的迷误。

translations.bn: আল্লাহর শপথ, যে কেউ লাইলাতুল কদরকে বিশ্বাস করে সে জানে যে এটি বিশেষভাবে আমাদের জন্য, রাসুলুল্লাহ (সা.) এর সেই বাণীর কারণে যা তিনি আলীকে (আ.) তাঁর মৃত্যু নিকটবর্তী হলে বলেছিলেন: এই হল তোমাদের আমার পরে ওলি; যদি তোমরা তাকে মেনে চলো তাহলে হেদায়েত পাবে। কিন্তু যে লাইলাতুল কদরে যা আছে তাতে ঈমান রাখে না সে অস্বীকারকারী, এবং যে ঈমান রাখে কিন্তু আমাদের মতের বিপরীত — তার জন্য সত্যে আর কোনো পথ নেই এছাড়া যে সে বলবে এটি আমাদের জন্য; না বললে সে মিথ্যাবাদী।
translations.de: Und bei Allah, wer an die Nacht der Bestimmung glaubt, weiß, dass sie uns ausschließlich gehört, aufgrund der Worte des Gesandten Allahs an Ali, als der Tod ihm nahe war: Dies ist euer Beschützer nach mir; wenn ihr ihm gehorcht, werdet ihr rechtgeleitet sein. Aber wer nicht an das glaubt, was in der Nacht der Bestimmung ist, ist ein Verleugner; und wer an die Nacht der Bestimmung glaubt, aber eine andere Ansicht als unsere hat — es bleibt ihm in der Wahrheit nichts anderes übrig, als zu sagen, dass sie uns gehört; und wer es nicht sagt, ist ein Lügner.
translations.en: And by God, whoever believes in the Night of Power knows that it belongs to us exclusively, by virtue of the saying of the Messenger of God (peace be upon him and his family) to Ali (peace be upon him) when death drew near him: This is your guardian after me — if you obey him you will be rightly guided. But whoever does not believe in what is in the Night of Power is a denier, and whoever believes in the Night of Power while holding a view other than ours — it is not permissible for him in truth except to say that it belongs to us; and whoever does not say so is a liar.
translations.es: Y por Dios, quien cree en la Noche del Destino sabe que es exclusivamente para nosotros, en virtud de las palabras del Mensajero de Dios a Alí cuando se acercó su muerte: Este es vuestro guardián después de mí; si le obedecéis estaréis bien guiados. Pero quien no crea en lo que contiene la Noche del Destino es un negador; y quien crea en la Noche del Destino pero sostenga una opinión contraria a la nuestra — no tiene espacio en la veracidad salvo decir que es para nosotros; y quien no lo diga es un mentiroso.
translations.fa: قسم به خدا، هر کس به شب قدر ایمان دارد می‌داند که آن خاص ماست، به سبب سخن رسول الله صلی الله علیه وآله به علی علیه السلام هنگامی که مرگش نزدیک شد: این ولی شما پس از من است، اگر از او اطاعت کنید هدایت می‌یابید. اما کسی که به آنچه در شب قدر است ایمان ندارد منکر است، و کسی که به شب قدر ایمان دارد اما بر غیر نظر ما است، در راستگویی جز این راهی ندارد که بگوید آن برای ماست؛ و کسی که این را نگوید دروغگوست.
translations.fr: Et par Allah, quiconque croit en la Nuit du Destin sait qu'elle nous appartient exclusivement, en vertu des paroles du Messager d'Allah à Ali quand la mort le rapprocha : Voici votre tuteur après moi ; si vous lui obéissez vous serez bien guidés. Mais quiconque ne croit pas en ce que contient la Nuit du Destin est un négateur ; et quiconque croit en la Nuit du Destin tout en ayant un avis contraire au nôtre — il ne lui reste en vérité qu'à dire qu'elle nous appartient ; et qui ne le dit pas est un menteur.
translations.id: Dan demi Allah, siapa pun yang membenarkan Lailatul Qadar pasti mengetahui bahwa ia milik kami secara khusus, berdasarkan sabda Rasulullah kepada Ali ketika kematian beliau mendekat: Ini adalah wali kalian setelahku; jika kalian menaatinya kalian akan mendapat petunjuk. Namun siapa yang tidak beriman kepada apa yang ada dalam Lailatul Qadar adalah pengingkar, dan siapa yang beriman kepada Lailatul Qadar namun berpandangan selain pandangan kami — ia tidak memiliki ruang dalam kejujuran kecuali mengatakan bahwa ia milik kami; dan siapa yang tidak mengatakannya maka dia adalah pendusta.
translations.ru: И клянусь Аллахом, тот, кто верит в Ночь Предопределения, знает, что она принадлежит исключительно нам, благодаря словам Посланника Аллаха Али, когда приблизилась его смерть: Это ваш покровитель после меня; если вы будете подчиняться ему, вы обретёте руководство. Но тот, кто не верит в то, что содержится в Ночи Предопределения, — отрицатель; и тот, кто верит в Ночь Предопределения, но придерживается взглядов, отличных от наших, — для него в истине нет иного пути, кроме как сказать, что она принадлежит нам; и тот, кто не скажет этого — лжец.
translations.tr: Allah'a yemin olsun ki Kadir Gecesine inanan kimse, Rasulullah'ın vefatı yaklaşırken Ali'ye söylediği söz sebebiyle bu gecenin yalnızca bize ait olduğunu bilir: Bu, benden sonra sizin velinizdedir; eğer ona itaat ederseniz hidayete erersiniz. Kadir Gecesindekine inanmayan ise münkirdir. Kadir Gecesine inanan ama bizim görüşümüzün dışında olan kimse ise, doğrulukta bu gecenin bize ait olduğunu söylemekten başka seçeneği yoktur; söylemeyenler ise yalancıdır.
translations.ur: اللہ کی قسم، جو بھی لیلۃ القدر پر یقین رکھتا ہے وہ جانتا ہے کہ یہ خاص ہمارے لیے ہے، رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ کے اس قول کی وجہ سے جو انہوں نے علی علیہ السلام سے اپنی وفات کے قریب فرمایا: یہ تمہارے بعد تمہارا ولی ہے، اگر تم نے اس کی اطاعت کی تو ہدایت پاؤ گے۔ لیکن جو لیلۃ القدر میں موجود چیز پر ایمان نہیں رکھتا وہ منکر ہے، اور جو لیلۃ القدر پر ایمان رکھتا ہے لیکن ہمارے نقطہ نظر کے خلاف ہے، اس کے لیے سچائی میں کوئی گنجائش نہیں سوائے اس کے کہ وہ کہے کہ یہ ہمارے لیے ہے، اور جو یہ نہ کہے وہ جھوٹا ہے۔
translations.zh: 以真主发誓，凡信仰命运之夜的人必然知道它专属于我们，因为真主使者在弥留之际对阿里所说的话：这是我之后你们的监护人；若你们服从他，你们将得到正道。但不信仰命运之夜所含之物的是否认者；而信仰命运之夜却持与我们不同观点者，在诚实中他别无选择，只能说它属于我们；不这样说者是说谎者。

translations.bn: নিশ্চয়ই আল্লাহ আজ্জা ওয়া জাল্লা অনেক মহান যে তিনি রুহ ও ফেরেশতাদের সাথে আদেশ একজন কাফের ফাসিকের কাছে নাযিল করবেন। যদি তারা বলে যে এটি সেই খলিফার কাছে নাযিল হয় যে সেই পদে আছে, তাহলে তাদের এই কথার কোনো মূল্য নেই; যদি তারা বলে যে কারো কাছে নাযিল হয় না, তাহলে এটা সম্ভব নয় যে কোনো কিছু কোনো কিছু ছাড়াই নাযিল হবে; এবং যদি তারা বলে — এবং বলবেই — যে এটা কিছু নয়, তাহলে তারা অনেক দূরের গমরাহিতে পড়ে গেছে।
translations.de: Gewiss ist Allah, der Mächtige und Erhabene, zu groß dafür, den Befehl mit dem Geist und den Engeln zu einem ungläubigen Frevler herabzusenden. Wenn sie sagen, er steige zum Kalifen herab, der dieses Amt bekleidet, dann ist ihre Aussage wertlos; und wenn sie sagen, er steige zu niemandem herab, kann es nicht sein, dass etwas auf nichts herabsteigt; und wenn sie sagen — und sie werden es sagen — dass dies nichts ist, dann haben sie sich in einem weit entfernten Irrtum verirrt.
translations.en: Surely God, Mighty and Majestic, is too exalted to send down the Command with the Spirit and the Angels to a disbeliever, a transgressor. If they say that it descends to the Caliph who claims that authority, then their saying is worthless; and if they say that it does not descend to anyone, it cannot be that something descends upon nothing; and if they say — and they will say — that this is nothing, then they have gone astray with a far-reaching straying.
translations.es: Ciertamente Dios, el Poderoso y Majestuoso, es demasiado Grande para enviar el Mandato con el Espíritu y los Ángeles a un incrédulo transgresor. Si dicen que desciende al Califa que ostenta ese cargo, su afirmación no vale nada; si dicen que no desciende a nadie, no puede ser que algo descienda sobre nada; y si dicen — y lo dirán — que esto no es nada, entonces habrán errado con un extravío lejano.
translations.fa: خداوند عزوجل بزرگتر از آن است که فرمان را با روح و ملائکه به کافری فاسق نازل کند. اگر بگویند به خلیفه‌ای که بر این منصب است نازل می‌شود، گفتارشان ارزشی ندارد؛ اگر بگویند به هیچ کس نازل نمی‌شود، ممکن نیست چیزی بدون آنکه جایی باشد نازل شود؛ و اگر بگویند — و خواهند گفت — که این چیزی نیست، پس گمراهی دوری اختیار کرده‌اند.
translations.fr: Certes Allah, Puissant et Majestueux, est trop Grand pour faire descendre l'Ordre avec l'Esprit et les Anges vers un mécréant pervers. S'ils disent qu'il descend vers le Calife qui détient ce poste, alors leur parole ne vaut rien ; et s'ils disent qu'il ne descend vers personne, il ne peut se faire que quelque chose descende sur rien ; et s'ils disent — et ils le diront — que ceci n'est rien, alors ils se sont égarés d'un égarement lointain.
translations.id: Sesungguhnya Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Mulia terlalu Agung untuk menurunkan perintah beserta Ruh dan para Malaikat kepada seorang kafir yang fasik. Jika mereka mengatakan bahwa ia turun kepada Khalifah yang memegang jabatan itu, maka ucapan mereka tidak bernilai apa-apa; jika mereka mengatakan bahwa ia tidak turun kepada siapapun, maka tidak mungkin sesuatu turun tanpa ada yang dituju; dan jika mereka mengatakan — dan mereka akan mengatakan — bahwa ini bukan apa-apa, maka sungguh mereka telah sesat dengan kesesatan yang jauh.
translations.ru: Поистине, Аллах, Великий и Могучий, слишком Велик, чтобы ниспосылать Повеление с Духом и ангелами к неверующему грешнику. Если они скажут, что оно нисходит к халифу, занимающему этот пост, то их слова ничего не стоят; если они скажут, что оно ни к кому не нисходит, то не может быть, чтобы что-то нисходило ни на что; и если они скажут — а они скажут — что это ничто, то они впали в далёкое заблуждение.
translations.tr: Allah Azze ve Celle, Ruhu ve melekleri kâfir bir fasığa indirmekten çok yücedir. Eğer bu Hilafeti elinde tutan halifeye iner derlerse bu sözleri bir şey değildir; eğer kimseye inmez derlerse bir şeyin bir şeye inmeksizin nazil olması mümkün değildir; eğer derlerse — ve diyecekler — ki bu bir şey değil, işte onlar uzak bir sapıklığa düşmüşlerdir.
translations.ur: بیشک اللہ عزوجل اس سے بہت برتر ہے کہ وہ روح اور ملائکہ کے ساتھ حکم ایک کافر فاسق پر نازل کرے۔ اگر وہ کہیں کہ یہ اس خلیفہ پر نازل ہوتا ہے جو اس منصب پر ہے، تو ان کا یہ قول کچھ نہیں؛ اور اگر وہ کہیں کہ کسی پر نازل نہیں ہوتا، تو یہ ممکن نہیں کہ کوئی چیز کسی چیز کے بغیر نازل ہو؛ اور اگر وہ کہیں — اور کہیں گے — کہ یہ کوئی چیز نہیں، تو وہ دور کی گمراہی میں جا پڑے۔
translations.zh: 真主（尊贵而荣耀的主）远比让命令与圣灵和天使降临到不信道的悖逆者那里更为崇高。若他们说它降临到担任此职的哈里发身上，那他们的话一无是处；若他们说它不降临到任何人身上，则不可能某物降临到虚无之上；若他们说——他们会说——这不是什么，那他们已陷入深远的迷误。

diacritics_changes: Added full tashkeel to all words; original had partial diacritics with some honorific markers only

isnad_matn.matn_ar: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ لِمَا تَرَوْنَ مَنْ بَعَثَهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ لِلشَّقَاءِ عَلَى أَهْلِ الضَّلَالَةِ مِنْ أَجْنَادِ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَأَزْوَاجِهِمْ أَكْثَرُ مِمَّا تَرَوْنَ خَلِيفَةَ اللَّهِ الَّذِي بَعَثَهُ لِلْعَدْلِ وَالصَّوَابِ مِنَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ قِيلَ يَا أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ وَكَيْفَ يَكُونُ شَيْءٌ أَكْثَرَ مِنَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ قَالَ كَمَا شَاءَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ قَالَ السَّائِلُ يَا أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ إِنِّي لَوْ حَدَّثْتُ بَعْضَ الشِّيعَةِ بِهَذَا الْحَدِيثِ لَأَنْكَرُوهُ قَالَ كَيْفَ يُنْكِرُونَهُ قَالَ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ الْمَلَائِكَةَ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلَامُ أَكْثَرُ مِنَ الشَّيَاطِينِ قَالَ صَدَقْتَ افْهَمْ عَنِّي مَا أَقُولُ إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ مِنْ يَوْمٍ وَلَا لَيْلَةٍ إِلَّا وَجَمِيعُ الْجِنِّ وَالشَّيَاطِينِ تَزُورُ أَئِمَّةَ الضَّلَالَةِ وَيَزُورُ إِمَامَ الْهُدَى عَدَدُهُمْ مِنَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ حَتَّى إِذَا أَتَتْ لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ فَيَهْبِطُ فِيهَا مِنَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ إِلَى وَلِيِّ الْأَمْرِ خَلَقَ اللَّهُ أَوْ قَالَ قَيَّضَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ مِنَ الشَّيَاطِينِ بِعَدَدِهِمْ ثُمَّ زَارُوا وَلِيَّ الضَّلَالَةِ فَأَتَوْهُ بِالْإِفْكِ وَالْكَذِبِ حَتَّى لَعَلَّهُ يُصْبِحُ فَيَقُولُ رَأَيْتُ كَذَا وَكَذَا فَلَوْ سَأَلَ وَلِيَّ الْأَمْرِ عَنْ ذَلِكَ لَقَالَ رَأَيْتَ شَيْطَاناً أَخْبَرَكَ بِكَذَا وَكَذَا حَتَّى يُفَسِّرَ لَهُ تَفْسِيراً وَيُعْلِمَهُ الضَّلَالَةَ الَّتِي هُوَ عَلَيْهَا وَايْمُ اللَّهِ إِنَّ مَنْ صَدَّقَ بِلَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ لَيَعْلَمُ أَنَّهَا لَنَا خَاصَّةً لِقَوْلِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ لِعَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ حِينَ دَنَا مَوْتُهُ هَذَا وَلِيُّكُمْ مِنْ بَعْدِي فَإِنْ أَطَعْتُمُوهُ رَشَدْتُمْ وَلَكِنْ مَنْ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِمَا فِي لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ مُنْكِرٌ وَمَنْ آمَنَ بِلَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ مِمَّنْ عَلَى غَيْرِ رَأْيِنَا فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَسَعُهُ فِي الصِّدْقِ إِلَّا أَنْ يَقُولَ إِنَّهَا لَنَا وَمَنْ لَمْ يَقُلْ فَإِنَّهُ كَاذِبٌ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ أَعْظَمُ مِنْ أَنْ يُنَزِّلَ الْأَمْرَ مَعَ الرُّوحِ وَالْمَلَائِكَةِ إِلَى كَافِرٍ فَاسِقٍ فَإِنْ قَالَ إِنَّهُ يُنَزِّلُ إِلَى الْخَلِيفَةِ الَّذِي هُوَ عَلَيْهَا فَلَيْسَ قَوْلُهُمْ ذَلِكَ بِشَيْءٍ وَإِنْ قَالُوا إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ يُنَزِّلُ إِلَى أَحَدٍ فَلَا يَكُونُ أَنْ يُنَزَّلَ شَيْءٌ إِلَى غَيْرِ شَيْءٍ وَإِنْ قَالُوا وَسَيَقُولُونَ لَيْسَ هَذَا بِشَيْءٍ فَقَدْ ضَلُّوا ضَلَالًا بَعِيداً

narrators.known_identity: Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (AS), the fifth Imam (d. 114 AH)

key_phrases.phrase_en: Understand from me what I am saying

bn.أَئِمَّةُ الضَّلَالَةِ: গমরাহির ইমাম — মিথ্যা নেতারা যারা কর্তৃত্ব দখল করেছিল
bn.لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ: লাইলাতুল কদর — রমজানের সেই মুবারক রাত যখন ভাগ্য নির্ধারিত হয়
bn.وَلِيُّ الْأَمْرِ: ওলিউল আমর — আহলুল বাইতের বৈধ ইমাম

de.أَئِمَّةُ الضَّلَالَةِ: Imame der Irre — falsche Führer, die die Autorität usurpiert haben
de.لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ: Laylat al-Qadr — die gesegnete Nacht im Ramadan, in der die göttlichen Bestimmungen festgelegt werden
de.وَلِيُّ الْأَمْرِ: Herr des Befehls — der rechtmäßige Imam der Ahlulbayt

en.أَئِمَّةُ الضَّلَالَةِ: Imams of misguidance — false leaders who usurped authority
en.أَجْنَادُ الشَّيَاطِينِ: Armies of the Satans — spiritual forces of evil that support false leaders
en.خَلِيفَةُ اللَّهِ: Caliph/Vicegerent of God — the true Imam appointed by God
en.لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ: The Night of Power/Predetermination (Laylat al-Qadr) — the blessed night in Ramadan described in Surah 97, when divine decrees are determined
en.وَلِيُّ الْأَمْرِ: Master/Guardian of the Command — the legitimate Imam of the Ahlulbayt

es.أَئِمَّةُ الضَّلَالَةِ: Imanes del extravío — líderes falsos que usurparon la autoridad
es.لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ: Laylat al-Qadr — la noche bendita en Ramadán cuando se determinan los decretos divinos
es.وَلِيُّ الْأَمْرِ: Señor del Mando — el Imam legítimo de los Ahlulbayt

fa.أَئِمَّةُ الضَّلَالَةِ: ائمه ضلالت — رهبران دروغینی که قدرت را غصب کردند
fa.لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ: شب قدر — شب مبارکی در ماه رمضان که تقدیرها در آن رقم می‌خورد
fa.وَلِيُّ الْأَمْرِ: ولی امر — امام مشروع اهل بیت

fr.أَئِمَّةُ الضَّلَالَةِ: Imams de l'égarement — faux dirigeants qui ont usurpé l'autorité
fr.لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ: Laylat al-Qadr — la nuit bénie du Ramadan où les décrets divins sont déterminés

similar_content_hints.description: Other hadiths from Al-Kafi's chapter on Laylat al-Qadr that discuss the descent of angels to the Imam of the time and the exclusive connection of this night to the Ahlulbayt.
Hadiths discussing the contrast between angels attending the true Imam and satanic forces supporting false claimants to leadership — a recurring theme in the cosmological chapters of Al-Kafi.
Hadiths from Nahj al-Balagha or other collections where Imam Ali addresses the question of legitimate succession after the Prophet, emphasizing his exclusive right to the wilayah.

summaries.bn: ইমাম মুহাম্মাদ আল-বাকির (আ.) বিস্তারিতভাবে বর্ণনা করেন যে লাইলাতুল কদর (সূরা ৯৭ থেকে) বিশেষভাবে আহলুল বাইতের ইমামদের জন্য। তিনি ব্যাখ্যা করেন যে প্রতি রাতে শয়তানরা গমরাহির ইমামদের জিয়ারত করে এবং সমসংখ্যক ফেরেশতা হুদার ইমামের জিয়ারত করে, এবং আল্লাহ কাফের বা ফাসিকের কাছে রুহ ও ফেরেশতা পাঠান না।
summaries.de: Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (Friede sei mit ihm) erklärt eingehend, dass die Nacht der Bestimmung (Laylat al-Qadr, Sure 97) ausschließlich den Imamen der Ahlulbayt gehört. Er klärt auf, dass jede Nacht die Satane die Imame der Irre besuchen, während eine gleich große Anzahl von Engeln den Imam der Führung besucht, und dass Allah den Geist und die Engel nicht zu einem Ungläubigen oder Frevler herabsendet.
summaries.en: Imam al-Baqir (AS) explains in a detailed discourse that Laylat al-Qadr (the Night of Power from Surah 97) belongs exclusively to the Imams of the Ahlulbayt. He clarifies an apparent paradox: while Angels are greater in number than Satans overall, on every day and night the Satans visit the imams of misguidance while an equal number of Angels visits the Imam of Guidance. On Laylat al-Qadr specifically, the Angels descend to the Master of the Command (the Imam), while an equal number of Satans visit the false claimants, bringing them fabrications. This teaching was addressed to a questioner in the early Abbasid period when the question of legitimate religious and political authority was acutely contested.
summaries.es: El Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (la paz sea con él) explica en detalle que la Noche del Destino (Laylat al-Qadr, Surah 97) pertenece exclusivamente a los Imames de los Ahlulbayt. Aclara que cada noche los Satanes visitan a los imanes del extravío mientras un número equivalente de Ángeles visita al Imam de la Guía, y que Dios no enviará el Espíritu y los Ángeles a un incrédulo o transgresor.
summaries.fa: امام محمد باقر علیه السلام به تفصیل بیان می‌فرماید که لیلة القدر (شب قدر از سوره 97) مختص ائمه اهل بیت است. توضیح می‌دهد که هر شب شیاطین ائمه ضلالت را زیارت می‌کنند در حالی که به همان تعداد ملائکه امام هدی را زیارت می‌کنند، و خداوند روح و ملائکه را به کافر و فاسق نازل نمی‌کند.
summaries.fr: L'Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (que la paix soit sur lui) explique en détail que la Nuit du Destin (Laylat al-Qadr, Sourate 97) appartient exclusivement aux Imams des Ahlulbayt. Il précise que chaque nuit les Satans rendent visite aux imams de l'égarement tandis qu'un nombre équivalent d'Anges rend visite à l'Imam de la Guidance, et qu'Allah ne fera pas descendre l'Esprit et les Anges vers un mécréant ou un pervers.
summaries.id: Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (a.s.) menjelaskan secara rinci bahwa Lailatul Qadar (dari Surah 97) adalah milik khusus para imam Ahlulbayt. Beliau mengklarifikasi bahwa setiap malam para setan mengunjungi imam-imam kesesatan sementara jumlah yang sama dari malaikat mengunjungi Imam Petunjuk, dan Allah tidak akan menurunkan Ruh dan para malaikat kepada orang kafir atau fasik.
summaries.ru: Имам Мухаммад аль-Бакир (мир ему) подробно объясняет, что Ночь Предопределения (Лайлат аль-Кадр, Сура 97) принадлежит исключительно Имамам Ахль аль-Байт. Он разъясняет, что каждую ночь шайтаны посещают имамов заблуждения, тогда как равное им число ангелов посещает Имама Наставления, и что Аллах не ниспошлёт Дух и ангелов к неверующему или грешнику.
summaries.tr: İmam Muhammed el-Bakır (a.s.) Kadir Gecesi'nin (Surah 97'deki) yalnızca Ehl-i Beyt imamlarına özgü olduğunu ayrıntılı biçimde açıklamaktadır. Her gece şeytanların sapıklık imamlarını ziyaret ettiğini, eşit sayıda meleğin ise hidayet İmamını ziyaret ettiğini ve Allah'ın kâfir ve fasık olanlara Ruh ve melekleri göndermeyeceğini vurgulamaktadır.
summaries.ur: امام محمد باقر علیہ السلام نے تفصیل سے بیان فرمایا کہ لیلۃ القدر (سورہ 97 کی رات) خاص طور پر اہل بیت کے اماموں کے لیے ہے۔ انہوں نے یہ واضح کیا کہ ہر روز شیاطین ائمہ ضلالت کی زیارت کرتے ہیں جبکہ برابر تعداد میں ملائکہ امام ہدی کی زیارت کرتے ہیں، اور یہ کہ اللہ روح اور ملائکہ کو کافر یا فاسق حکمران کے پاس نہیں بھیجتا۔
summaries.zh: 伊玛目穆罕默德·巴基尔（愿主赐他平安）详细阐述了命运之夜（盖德尔夜，第97章）专属于艾赫里·白特的伊玛目。他解释道：每天每夜撒旦拜访迷误的伊玛目，而同等数量的天使拜访引导的伊玛目；真主不会将圣灵和天使降临到不信道者或悖逆者身上。
